Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts product catalog, promotions, and brake part details to inform email content.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries or contact properties.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity events such as website visits, page views, and engagement on the R1 website.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI chat agent on the R1 Concepts website, answering product questions and guiding purchases.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will use AI to interpret customer intent, retrieve relevant product and order data, and generate helpful conversational responses.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover potential content creators and influencers in relevant niches.

Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Automates the initial vetting of hundreds of creators in minutes, replacing hours of manual research and subjective evaluation.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt guidelines stored in Google Drive for AI reference.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach message follows proven, optimized sequences rather than starting from generic templates each time.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails, tailoring messaging to DFC's First to Market positioning.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts user-uploaded MHM vehicle part number files and the New Availability Guide, then runs matching logic to identify qualifying products directly in the browser.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, extracting every text field including headlines, descriptions, and primary text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides comprehensive, real-time visibility into every piece of live ad copy without manually clicking through dozens of campaigns and ad sets.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for specific target phrases and flags each match with the exact field location and surrounding copy context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims across hundreds of ads in seconds instead of hours of manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged list to the requester, showing each matched phrase, the ad it appeared in, and the specific copy field where it was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report on demand that enables the team to immediately address problematic ad copy before it causes issues.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking 54 total agents — 22 completed, 12 in progress, and 20 planned. Two new agents were added to the pipeline this week: **R1 Video Clipper** and **Paid Channel Chat bot**, both entering the planned stage. No agents changed stages this week, so the team is heads-down building across the 12 currently in progress. Steady momentum across the board — more updates to come as work continues!
